# Voiler

AI-first fullstack monorepo boilerplate for web applications, optimized for AI-agent-driven development.

## Stack

- Frontend: TanStack Start (React 19, SSR via Nitro, Vite)
- API: tRPC + Hono (port 4000)
- Auth: Better Auth (sessions, OAuth Google/GitHub, impersonation)
- ORM: Drizzle (pg-core) + PostgreSQL (dev via Docker)
- Validation: Zod (single source of truth)
- Errors: neverthrow (Result/ResultAsync — no throw/try-catch in business logic)
- Monorepo: Turborepo + pnpm
- Tests: Vitest (unit) + Playwright (E2E)
- Format: Prettier (no semicolons, printWidth 100)
- UI: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui

## Directory Structure

```
apps/
  api/         Hono server, tRPC router, use cases, adapters, container.ts (DI root)
  web/         TanStack Start frontend, auth forms, dashboard
packages/
  domain/      Entities, branded value objects, domain errors (no infra imports)
  core/        Port interfaces (IUserRepository, etc.), AppError
  schema/      Zod schemas for inputs, outputs, DB tables
  config-env/  Zod-validated environment variables
```

## Key Commands

```
docker compose up db -d              Start PostgreSQL
pnpm --filter @voiler/api dev        API dev server (port 4000)
pnpm --filter @voiler/web dev        Web dev server (port 3000)
pnpm lint                            ESLint strict
pnpm typecheck                       tsc --noEmit
pnpm test                            Vitest unit tests
pnpm test:e2e                        Playwright E2E
pnpm format:check                    Prettier check
pnpm --filter @voiler/api db:push    Push schema to DB
```

## Key Patterns

- All fallible functions return Result<T,E> or ResultAsync<T,E> from neverthrow
- Branded types for domain values (Email, UserId, Password)
- tRPC routers are thin: parse input → call use case → return result
- container.ts is the ONLY file importing concrete adapters
- Arrow functions mandatory; const over let; no mutation
- Max 1 parameter per arrow function (always wrap in object)
- No semicolons; trailing commas in multi-line structures; max 100 char lines
- Explicit type annotations on all const; any and casting forbidden
- JSDoc on all exported functions
- Hexagonal: domain → core ports → adapters (dependency direction inward only)
